bundle.origin: TRIAD-INT4 v1 calibration, q4f16_1 export (session-3 bundle)

iters_failed_note: force-stop+launch+chat-icon-tap sequence intermittently fails to register the send button tap; the patched APK never emits the JSON line in those iters. Not a model-side problem.

thermal_finding.observation: decode tok/s drops monotonically with completion length
thermal_finding.interpretation: Sustained-generation decode tok/s is ~25-33 tok/s on Xclipse 950; short cold-cache decode is ~35-36 tok/s. The session-3 single-prompt value of 35.56 tok/s reflected only the short-generation regime. See ADR-014: at N=3 with sigma~6% of mean, deltas <14% are not statistically distinguishable.

reference_baseline_comparison.reason: q4f16_1 community-reference bundle is not currently installed on the device; only the TRIAD-INT4 bundle is in /data/data/ai.mlc.mlcchat/files/. To do the paired comparison, the reference bundle must be staged via mlc_llm + adb push, then BENCH_BASELINE_JSON=<ref.json> tools/bench_android.sh <triad_row> 10 1 60 produces the paired-t output.
